message:
fix(connectors): PayPal/Shopify idempotency key propagation, Plaid C3.4 test fix

PayPal: propagate InvokeRequest.idempotency_key as PayPal-Request-Id header
on create_order, capture_order, refund_capture, create_invoice, send_invoice.

Shopify: propagate InvokeRequest.idempotency_key as X-Shopify-Idempotency-Key
header on create_product, update_product, create_order.

Plaid: add CapabilityConstraints with constraints_cbor() to test token builder,
fixing 2 pre-existing test failures caused by C3.4 default-deny enforcement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
